text.title: trello-kanban Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for trello-kanban as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Creating a card with idList set by fetching the list name on every API call.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Wastes 1 API call per card write. Store list IDs in session memory after the first fetch.
